beats.caption: AC-1 - live host vitals: CPU load and memory usage
beats.expectedScreen: the CPU and Memory vitals cards, each showing a live percentage, a usage bar and load averages

beats.caption: AC-3 - network throughput: rx and tx per second
beats.expectedScreen: the Network vitals card showing rx and tx throughput values in bytes per second

beats.caption: AC-2 - per-mount disk usage (warn 85% / crit 95%)
beats.expectedScreen: the Disks section listing each mount with used/total and a percentage usage bar

beats.caption: AC-4 - garrison-* systemd units section (none active)
beats.expectedScreen: the Garrison units section showing the empty state 'no garrison-* systemd user units'

beats.caption: AC-5 - vitals refresh live (5s cadence)
beats.expectedScreen: the vitals grid with CPU, Memory and Network values updating live over the hold

beats.caption: AC-6 - display-only: no action buttons on the vitals surface
beats.expectedScreen: the full read-only vitals surface (CPU / Memory / Network / Disks / units) with no buttons or controls
